history.created_by: RUN |2 version=21.0.11.10-1 package_version=1 /bin/sh -c set -eux     && ARCH="$(rpm --query --queryformat='%{ARCH}' rpm)"     && rpm --import file:///etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-amazon-linux-2023     && echo "localpkg_gpgcheck=1" >> /etc/dnf/dnf.conf     && CORRETO_TEMP=$(mktemp -d)     && pushd ${CORRETO_TEMP}     && RPM_LIST=("java-21-amazon-corretto-headless-$version.amzn2023.${package_version}.${ARCH}.rpm")     && for rpm in ${RPM_LIST[@]}; do     curl --fail -O https://corretto.aws/downloads/resources/$(echo $version | tr '-' '.')/${rpm}     && rpm -K "${CORRETO_TEMP}/${rpm}" | grep -F "${CORRETO_TEMP}/${rpm}: digests signatures OK" || exit 1;     done     && dnf install -y ${CORRETO_TEMP}/*.rpm     && popd     && rm -rf /usr/lib/jvm/java-21-amazon-corretto.${ARCH}/lib/src.zip     && rm -rf ${CORRETO_TEMP}     && dnf clean all     && sed -i '/localpkg_gpgcheck=1/d' /etc/dnf/dnf.conf # buildkit

LABEL org.opencontainers.image.source=https://github.com/apache/polaris org.opencontainers.image.revision=dd306009d81a0e15adafe9dcd7d1c6d04d326f34 org.opencontainers.image.version=1.6.0 org.opencontainers.image.created=2026-07-04T05:22:21Z org.opencontainers.image.description=Apache Polaris 1.6.0 built from the ASF-signed source release org.opencontainers.image.licenses=Apache-2.0 org.opencontainers.image.base.name=docker.io/library/amazoncorretto dev.shirokuma.runtime-base.arm64-digest=sha256:ba1fe4a3fd4c6b70360183fccd1f0a168c3ea6f73709e8f81945cb9087431ff2
